   364→    report_path = report_dir / f"pipeline_{timestamp.strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.xlsx"
   365→
   366→    wb = Workbook()
   367→
   368→    # --- Sheet 1: Overview ---
   369→    ws_overview = wb.active
   370→    ws_overview.title = "概览"
   371→
   372→    header_font = Font(bold=True, color="FFFFFF")
   373→    header_fill = PatternFill(start_color="4472C4", end_color="4472C4", fill_type="solid")
   374→    border = Border(
   375→        left=Side(style="thin"), right=Side(style="thin"),
   376→        top=Side(style="thin"), bottom=Side(style="thin"),
   377→    )
   378→
   379→    overview_rows = [
   380→        ("执行时间", timestamp.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")),
   381→        ("搜索关键词", ", ".join(keywords)),
   382→        ("消息模板", template),
   383→        ("搜索模式", mode.value),
   384→        ("搜索结果数", results["total"]),
   385→        ("发送总数", results["sent"] + results["failed"]),
   386→        ("成功", results["sent"]),
   387→        ("失败", results["failed"]),
   388→        ("跳过(已沟通)", results["skipped"]),
   389→        ("限流", results["rate_limited"]),
   390→    ]
   391→
   392→    for r_idx, (key, value) in enumerate(overview_rows, 1):
   393→        cell_key = ws_overview.cell(row=r_idx, column=1, value=key)
   394→        cell_val = ws_overview.cell(row=r_idx, column=2, value=value)
   395→        cell_key.font = Font(bold=True)
   396→        for cell in (cell_key, cell_val):
   397→            cell.border = border
   398→            cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center")
   399→
   400→    ws_overview.column_dimensions["A"].width = 18
   401→    ws_overview.column_dimensions["B"].width = 40
   402→
   403→    # --- Sheet 2: Candidate Details ---
   404→    ws_details = wb.create_sheet(title="候选人详情")
   405→
   406→    columns = ["序号", "姓名", "职位", "公司", "地区", "脉脉ID", "沟通状态", "发送内容", "失败原因"]
   407→    for c_idx, col_name in enumerate(columns, 1):
   408→        cell = ws_details.cell(row=1, column=c_idx, value=col_name)
   409→        cell.font = header_font
   410→        cell.fill = header_fill
   411→        cell.alignment = Alignment(horizontal="center", vertical="center")
   412→        cell.border = border
   413→
   414→    # Build a lookup from maimai_id -> detail
   415→    details_by_id: Dict[str, dict] = {}
   416→    for detail in results.get("details", []):
   417→        details_by_id[detail["maimai_id"]] = detail
   418→
   419→    status_map = {
   420→        "sent": "已发送",
   421→        "failed": "失败",
   422→        "skipped": "跳过",
   423→        "rate_limited": "限流",
   424→    }
   425→
   426→    for r_idx, c in enumerate(candidates, 1):
   427→        detail = details_by_id.get(c.maimai_id, {})
   428→        raw_status = detail.get("status", "not_attempted")
   429→        status_label = status_map.get(raw_status, "未处理")
   430→        reason = detail.get("reason", "")
   431→
   432→        content = detail.get("content", "")
   433→        row_data = [r_idx, c.name, c.title, c.company, c.location or "", c.maimai_id, status_label, content, reason]
   434→        for c_idx, value in enumerate(row_data, 1):
   435→            cell = ws_details.cell(row=r_idx + 1, column=c_idx, value=value)
   436→            cell.border = border
   437→            cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center", wrap_text=True)
   438→
   439→    detail_widths = {"A": 6, "B": 12, "C": 25, "D": 20, "E": 12, "F": 18, "G": 12, "H": 40, "I": 30}
   440→    for col, width in detail_widths.items():
   441→        ws_details.column_dimensions[col].width = width
   442→
   443→    ws_details.freeze_panes = "A2"
   444→    ws_details.auto_filter.ref = ws_details.dimensions
   445→
   446→    wb.save(str(report_path))
   447→    logger.info(f"Pipeline report saved to: {report_path}")
   448→    console.print(f"[green]Pipeline report saved to: {report_path}[/green]")
   449→    return str(report_path)

   452→def save_run_history(
   453→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   454→    template: str,
   455→    mode: SearchMode,
   456→    results: dict,
   457→    dry_run: bool,
   458→    report_path: Optional[str] = None,
   459→) -> None:
   460→    """Append a pipeline run record to JSON and regenerate Markdown summary.
   461→
   462→    Produces two files under data/:
   463→    - run_history.json: machine-readable array of all runs
   464→    - run_history.md: human-readable Markdown table
   465→    """
   466→    import json
   467→    from loguru import logger
   468→
   469→    data_dir = Path("data")
   470→    data_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   471→    json_path = data_dir / "run_history.json"
   472→    md_path = data_dir / "run_history.md"
   473→
   474→    # Read existing records
   475→    records: List[dict] = []
   476→    if json_path.exists():
   477→        try:
   478→            records = json.loads(json_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   479→        except (json.JSONDecodeError, IOError):
   480→            logger.warning("Failed to read run_history.json, starting fresh")
   481→
   482→    # Build new record
   483→    timestamp = datetime.now()
   484→    record = {
   485→        "timestamp": timestamp.isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
   486→        "keywords": list(keywords),
   487→        "template": template,
   488→        "mode": mode.value if isinstance(mode, SearchMode) else mode,
   489→        "dry_run": dry_run,
   490→        "total": results.get("total", 0),
   491→        "sent": results.get("sent", 0),
   492→        "failed": results.get("failed", 0),
   493→        "skipped": results.get("skipped", 0),
   494→        "rate_limited": results.get("rate_limited", 0),
   495→        "report_file": Path(report_path).name if report_path else None,
   496→    }
   497→    records.append(record)
   498→
   499→    # Write JSON
   500→    json_path.write_text(
   501→        json.dumps(records, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8"
   502→    )
   503→
   504→    # Regenerate Markdown from full history
   505→    lines = [
   506→        "# Pipeline 运行历史",
   507→        "",
   508→        "| 时间 | 关键词 | 模板 | 模式 | 搜索数 | 发送 | 失败 | 跳过 | 限流 | 报告 |",
   509→        "|------|--------|------|------|--------|------|------|------|------|------|",
   510→    ]
   511→    for r in records:
   512→        ts = r["timestamp"][:16].replace("T", " ")
   513→        kws = ", ".join(r["keywords"])
   514→        tpl = r["template"]
   515→        m = r["mode"]
   516→        total = str(r["total"])
   517→        if r.get("dry_run"):
   518→            sent = failed = skipped = rate_limited = "-"
   519→        else:
   520→            sent = str(r["sent"])
   521→            failed = str(r["failed"])
   522→            skipped = str(r["skipped"])
   523→            rate_limited = str(r["rate_limited"])
   524→        report = r.get("report_file") or "-"
   525→        lines.append(
   526→            f"| {ts} | {kws} | {tpl} | {m} | {total} | {sent} | {failed} | {skipped} | {rate_limited} | {report} |"
   527→        )
   528→
   529→    md_path.write_text("\n".join(lines) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
   530→    logger.info(f"Run history updated: {json_path}")
   531→    console.print(f"[dim]运行历史已更新: {md_path}[/dim]")
   532→
   533→
   534→def display_candidates_table(candidates: List[CandidateBasic], title: str) -> None:
   535→    """Display a Rich table of candidates."""
   536→    table = Table(title=f"{title} ({len(candidates)} candidates)")
   537→    table.add_column("#", style="dim", justify="right")
   538→    table.add_column("Name", style="cyan")
   539→    table.add_column("Title", style="green")
   540→    table.add_column("Company", style="yellow")
   541→    table.add_column("Location", style="blue")
   542→    has_scores = any(getattr(c, 'score', None) is not None for c in candidates[:1])
   543→    if has_scores:
   544→        table.add_column("Score", style="magenta", justify="right")
   545→    table.add_column("ID", style="dim")
   546→
   547→    for i, c in enumerate(candidates[:50], 1):
   548→        row = [str(i), c.name, c.title, c.company, c.location or '']
   549→        if has_scores:
   550→            row.append(str(getattr(c, 'score', '')))
   551→        row.append(c.maimai_id)
   552→        table.add_row(*row)
   553→
   554→    console.print(table)
   555→
   556→    if len(candidates) > 50:
   557→        console.print(f"[dim]... and {len(candidates) - 50} more[/dim]")
   558→
   559→
   560→def display_send_results(results: dict, title: str = "Send Results", quota: Optional[dict] = None) -> None:
   561→    """Display send results summary table."""
   562→    console.print()
   563→    result_table = Table(title=title)
   564→    result_table.add_column("Metric", style="bold")
   565→    result_table.add_column("Count", justify="right")
   566→
   567→    result_table.add_row("Total candidates", str(results['total']))
   568→    result_table.add_row("Sent", f"[green]{results['sent']}[/green]")
   569→    result_table.add_row("Failed", f"[red]{results['failed']}[/red]")
   570→    result_table.add_row("Skipped (already messaged)", f"[yellow]{results['skipped']}[/yellow]")
   571→    result_table.add_row("Rate limited", f"[yellow]{results['rate_limited']}[/yellow]")
   572→    if quota:
   573→        result_table.add_row("联系券剩余", f"[cyan]{quota.get('uh_left', '?')}[/cyan]")
   574→
   575→    console.print(result_table)

   578→async def run_pipeline_default(
   579→    browser: BrowserManager,
   580→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   581→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
   582→    location: Optional[str],
   583→    max_pages: int,
   584→    template: str,
   585→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   586→    dry_run: bool,
   587→    skip_messaged: bool,
   588→    interactive: bool = False,
   589→    mode: SearchMode = SearchMode.SEARCH_CENTER,
   590→    skip_confirmation: bool = False,
   591→    exchange_phone: bool = False,
   592→    exchange_wechat: bool = False,
   593→) -> None:
   594→    """Pipeline: search all pages first, then send messages.
   595→
   596→    Saves a checkpoint after search completes so that message sending
   597→    can be resumed if interrupted.
   598→    """
   599→    checkpoint = CheckpointManager()
   600→
   601→    if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   602→        # Keep enterprise tab open for inline messaging (unless dry_run)
   603→        all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords_enterprise(
   604→            browser, keywords, company, max_pages,
   605→            keep_last_tab_open=not dry_run,
   606→        )
   607→    elif mode == SearchMode.TALENT_BANK:
   608→        all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords_talent_bank(
   609→            browser, keywords, company, max_pages,
   610→            keep_last_tab_open=not dry_run,
   611→        )
   612→    else:
   613→        all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords(
   614→            browser, keywords, company, location, max_pages,
   615→        )
   616→
   617→    if not all_candidates:
   618→        console.print("[yellow]No candidates found for any keyword.[/yellow]")
   619→        emit_progress("completed", result={"total": 0, "message": "No candidates found"})
   620→        return
   621→
   622→    # Save checkpoint after search (batch_pages=0 marks non-batch mode)
   623→    _save_checkpoint(
   624→        checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   625→        max_pages, 0, skip_messaged, interactive,
   626→        max_pages, [], seen_ids, {'total': 0, 'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'rate_limited': 0},
   627→        mode=mode.value, dry_run=dry_run,
   628→    )
   629→
   630→    display_candidates_table(all_candidates, "Pipeline Results")
   631→
   632→    # Emit search complete with candidate list for web confirmation
   633→    emit_progress("search_complete", candidates=[
   634→        {"maimai_id": c.maimai_id, "name": c.name, "title": c.title,
   635→         "company": c.company, "location": c.location or ""}
   636→        for c in all_candidates
   637→    ])
   638→
   639→    if dry_run:
   640→        console.print(f"\n[cyan][Dry Run] {len(all_candidates)} candidates found. No messages sent.[/cyan]")
   641→        save_run_history(
   642→            keywords, template, mode,
   643→            {'total': len(all_candidates), 'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'rate_limited': 0},
   644→            dry_run=True,
   645→        )
   646→        checkpoint.delete()
   647→        emit_progress("completed", result={"total": len(all_candidates), "dry_run": True})
   648→        return
   649→
   650→    if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   651→        results = await send_batch_enterprise(
   652→            all_candidates, template, variables, list(keywords), browser, skip_messaged,
   653→            skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   654→        )
   655→    elif mode == SearchMode.TALENT_BANK:
   656→        results = await send_batch_talent_bank(
   657→            all_candidates, template, variables, list(keywords), browser, skip_messaged,
   658→            skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   659→            exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
   660→            exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
   661→        )
   662→    else:
   663→        results = await send_batch(
   664→            all_candidates, template, variables, list(keywords), browser, skip_messaged, interactive,
   665→            skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   666→        )
   667→
   668→    # Fetch final quota for summary display
   669→    quota = await fetch_contact_quota(browser)
   670→    display_send_results(results, quota=quota)
   671→    report_path = generate_pipeline_report(all_candidates, results, keywords, template, mode)
   672→    save_run_history(keywords, template, mode, results, dry_run=False, report_path=report_path)
   673→
   674→    emit_progress("completed", result=results)
   675→
   676→    # Clean up checkpoint on successful completion
   677→    checkpoint.delete()
   678→    console.print("[dim]Checkpoint cleared (pipeline complete)[/dim]")
   679→
   680→    # Auto backup database after successful pipeline
   681→    _auto_backup_database()
   682→
   683→
   684→async def run_pipeline_batched(
   685→    browser: BrowserManager,
   686→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   687→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
   688→    location: Optional[str],
   689→    max_pages: int,
   690→    batch_pages: int,
   691→    template: str,
   692→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   693→    dry_run: bool,
   694→    skip_messaged: bool,
   695→    interactive: bool = False,
   696→    resume_ckpt=None,
   697→    mode: SearchMode = SearchMode.SEARCH_CENTER,
   698→    skip_confirmation: bool = False,
   699→    exchange_phone: bool = False,
   700→    exchange_wechat: bool = False,
   701→) -> None:
   702→    """Batched pipeline: search N pages, send messages, repeat."""
   703→    # Restore state from checkpoint or start fresh
   704→    if resume_ckpt:
   705→        # On resume, only treat sent_ids as truly "seen" (skip-worthy).
   706→        # Candidates that were found but not sent should be retried.
   707→        sent_ids = list(resume_ckpt.sent_ids)
   708→        seen_ids = set(sent_ids)  # only skip candidates already successfully sent
   709→        total_results = resume_ckpt.total_results or {
   710→            'total': 0, 'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'rate_limited': 0,
   711→        }
   712→        start_from_page = resume_ckpt.completed_pages + 1
   713→        console.print(f"[cyan]Resuming from page {start_from_page} (sent: {len(sent_ids)}, retrying unsent)[/cyan]")
   714→        checkpoint = resume_ckpt
   715→    else:
   716→        seen_ids = set()
   717→        sent_ids = []
   718→        total_results = {'total': 0, 'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'rate_limited': 0}
   719→        start_from_page = 1
   720→        checkpoint = CheckpointManager()
   721→
   722→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   723→    all_details: List[dict] = []
   724→    batch_num = 0
   725→    consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   726→
   727→    batch_start = start_from_page
   728→    while batch_start <= max_pages:
   729→        batch_page_count = min(batch_pages, max_pages - batch_start + 1)
   730→        batch_num += 1
   731→        batch_end = batch_start + batch_page_count - 1
   732→
   733→        console.print(f"\n[bold magenta]━━━ Batch {batch_num}: Pages {batch_start}-{batch_end} ━━━[/bold magenta]")
   734→
   735→        if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   736→            batch_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords_enterprise(
   737→                browser, keywords, company, batch_page_count,
   738→                keep_last_tab_open=not dry_run,
   739→            )
   740→        elif mode == SearchMode.TALENT_BANK:
   741→            batch_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords_talent_bank(
   742→                browser, keywords, company, batch_page_count,
   743→                keep_last_tab_open=not dry_run,
   744→            )
   745→        else:
   746→            batch_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords(
   747→                browser, keywords, company, location, batch_page_count, start_page=batch_start,
   748→            )
   749→        # Filter out globally seen IDs
   750→        batch_candidates = [c for c in batch_candidates if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids]
   751→        seen_ids.update(c.maimai_id for c in batch_candidates)
   752→        all_candidates.extend(batch_candidates)
   753→
   754→        if not batch_candidates:
   755→            consecutive_empty_batches += 1
   756→            console.print(f"[yellow]No new candidates in batch {batch_num}.[/yellow]")
   757→
   758→            if consecutive_empty_batches >= 2:
   759→                console.print("[red]Multiple consecutive empty batches detected. Verifying login status...[/red]")
   760→                if not await check_login_status(browser.page):
   761→                    console.print("[red]Session expired! Clearing session and re-authenticating...[/red]")
   762→                    session_manager = get_session_manager()
   763→                    await session_manager.clear()
   764→                    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   765→                    consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   766→                    console.print("[green]Re-authenticated. Retrying current batch...[/green]")
   767→                    batch_num -= 1
   768→                    continue
   769→                else:
   770→                    console.print("[yellow]Session appears valid. Possibly no more results for these keywords.[/yellow]")
   771→
   772→            _save_checkpoint(
   773→                checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   774→                max_pages, batch_pages, skip_messaged, interactive,
   775→                batch_end, sent_ids, seen_ids, total_results,
   776→                mode=mode.value, dry_run=dry_run,
   777→            )
   778→            batch_start += batch_pages
   779→            continue
   780→        else:
   781→            consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   782→
   783→        display_candidates_table(batch_candidates, f"Batch {batch_num} Results")
   784→
   785→        if dry_run:
   786→            console.print(f"\n[cyan][Dry Run] Batch {batch_num}: {len(batch_candidates)} candidates found. No messages sent.[/cyan]")
   787→            _save_checkpoint(
   788→                checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   789→                max_pages, batch_pages, skip_messaged, interactive,
   790→                batch_end, sent_ids, seen_ids, total_results,
   791→                mode=mode.value, dry_run=dry_run,
   792→            )
   793→            batch_start += batch_pages
   794→            continue
   795→
   796→        if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   797→            results = await send_batch_enterprise(
   798→                batch_candidates, template, variables, list(keywords), browser, skip_messaged,
   799→                skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   800→            )
   801→        elif mode == SearchMode.TALENT_BANK:
   802→            results = await send_batch_talent_bank(
   803→                batch_candidates, template, variables, list(keywords), browser, skip_messaged,
   804→                skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   805→                exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
   806→                exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
   807→            )
   808→        else:
   809→            results = await send_batch(
   810→                batch_candidates, template, variables, list(keywords), browser, skip_messaged, interactive,
   811→                skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   812→            )
   813→        batch_quota = await fetch_contact_quota(browser)
   814→        display_send_results(results, title=f"Batch {batch_num} Send Results", quota=batch_quota)
   815→
   816→        all_details.extend(results.get('details', []))
   817→        for detail in results.get('details', []):
   818→            if detail.get('status') == 'sent':
   819→                sent_ids.append(detail['maimai_id'])
   820→
   821→        for key in total_results:
   822→            total_results[key] += results[key]
   823→
   824→        _save_checkpoint(
   825→            checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   826→            max_pages, batch_pages, skip_messaged, interactive,
   827→            batch_end, sent_ids, seen_ids, total_results,
   828→            mode=mode.value, dry_run=dry_run,
   829→        )
   830→        console.print(f"[dim]Checkpoint saved (page {batch_end})[/dim]")
   831→
   832→        batch_start += batch_pages
   833→
   834→    # Final summary
   835→    console.print(f"\n[bold magenta]━━━ Pipeline Complete ━━━[/bold magenta]")
   836→    console.print(f"Total unique candidates found: {len(seen_ids)}")
   837→    report_path = None
   838→    if not dry_run and total_results['total'] > 0:
   839→        final_quota = await fetch_contact_quota(browser)
   840→        display_send_results(total_results, title="Overall Send Results", quota=final_quota)
   841→        total_results_with_details = {**total_results, 'details': all_details}
   842→        report_path = generate_pipeline_report(all_candidates, total_results_with_details, keywords, template, mode)
   843→
   844→    history_results = total_results if not dry_run else {
   845→        'total': len(seen_ids), 'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'rate_limited': 0,
   846→    }
   847→    save_run_history(keywords, template, mode, history_results, dry_run, report_path)
   848→
   849→    checkpoint.delete()
   850→    console.print("[dim]Checkpoint cleared (pipeline complete)[/dim]")
   851→
   852→    # Auto backup database after successful batched pipeline
   853→    _auto_backup_database()

  2211→        if not confirm:

  2214→
  2215→    # Send messages

  2218→    with Progress(

  2226→        for c in send_list:

  2242→            # Build per-candidate variables

  2249→            content = render_template(template["content"], variables)
  2250→
  2251→            # Scroll to find the candidate card

  2254→                await card_locator.scroll_into_view_if_needed(timeout=5000)
  2255→                await async_random_delay("action")

  2258→
  2259→            # Send inline

  2265→
  2266→            if success:

  2274→                rate_limiter.log_action("send_message", {

  2279→                _log_message(db_manager, c["maimai_id"], template_name, content, "sent")

1214→async def search_candidates_talent_bank(
  1215→    keywords: str,
  1216→    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
  1217→    pages: int = 1,
  1218→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
  1219→    keep_tab_open: bool = False,
  1220→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
  1221→    """Search for candidates via the talent bank path.
  1222→
  1223→    Flow:
  1224→    1. Navigate to enterprise entry -> click "招人" -> click "搜索" tab
  1225→    2. Input keywords in search box -> Enter
  1226→    3. Extract candidates from results
  1227→    4. For additional pages, scroll to trigger infinite scroll
  1228→    5. Close tab unless keep_tab_open is True
  1229→
  1230→    Args:
  1231→        keywords: Search keywords
  1232→        company: Filter by company names (optional)

  1234→        browser: Browser manager instance

  1236→
  1237→    Returns:
  1238→        List of CandidateBasic objects

  1240→    validate_keywords(keywords)
  1241→
  1242→    if browser is None:
  1243→        browser = get_browser_manager()
  1244→
  1245→    config = get_config()

  1248→
  1249→    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
  1250→
  1251→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
  1252→    seen_ids: set = set()
  1253→
  1254→    with Progress(
  1255→        SpinnerColumn(),
  1256→        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
  1257→        console=console,
  1258→    ) as progress:
  1259→        task = progress.add_task("Opening talent bank...", total=None)
  1260→
  1261→        try:
  1262→            await async_check_rate_limit("search")
  1263→
  1264→            page = browser.page
  1265→
  1266→            # Step 1: Navigate to talent bank entry
  1267→            progress.update(task, description="Navigating to talent bank...")
  1268→            await retry_navigation(page, TALENT_BANK_ENTRY_URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
  1269→            await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1270→
  1271→            # Click "招人" to enter talent bank
  1272→            entry_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.entry_button")
  1273→            entry_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(entry_sel, timeout=8000)
  1274→            if not entry_btn:
  1275→                raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Could not find talent bank entry: {entry_sel}")
  1276→            await entry_btn.click()
  1277→            await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1278→
  1279→            # Wait for talent bank URL
  1280→            try:
  1281→                await page.wait_for_url(
  1282→                    lambda url: "recruit/talents" in url,
  1283→                    timeout=15000,
  1284→                )
  1285→            except Exception:
  1286→                logger.warning(f"Talent bank URL not matched, current: {page.url}")
  1287→
  1288→            # Click "搜索" tab
  1289→            search_tab_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.search_tab")
  1290→            search_tab = await page.wait_for_selector(search_tab_sel, timeout=5000)
  1291→            if search_tab:
  1292→                await search_tab.click()
  1293→                await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1294→
  1295→            # Step 2: Input keywords and search
  1296→            progress.update(task, description=f"Searching: {keywords}")
  1297→
  1298→            search_input_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.search_input")
  1299→            await page.wait_for_selector(search_input_sel, timeout=8000)
  1300→            await human_type(page, search_input_sel, keywords)
  1301→            await async_random_delay("action")
  1302→            await page.keyboard.press("Enter")
  1303→            await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1304→
  1305→            # Wait for results to load
  1306→            await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
  1307→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
  1308→
  1309→            # Step 3: Extract candidates (with pagination via scroll)
  1310→            for page_num in range(1, pages + 1):
  1311→                progress.update(task, description=f"Extracting page {page_num}/{pages}...")
  1312→
  1313→                candidates = await _extract_talent_bank_results(page)
  1314→
  1315→                # Deduplicate across scroll pages
  1316→                candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids]
  1317→                for c in candidates:
  1318→                    seen_ids.add(c.maimai_id)
  1319→
  1320→                if not candidates:
  1321→                    logger.info(f"No talent bank results on page {page_num}")
  1322→                    break
  1323→
  1324→                # Filter non-R&D roles
  1325→                before_filter = len(candidates)
  1326→                candidates = [c for c in candidates if not _is_non_rd_title(c.title)]
  1327→                filtered = before_filter - len(candidates)
  1328→                if filtered > 0:
  1329→                    logger.info(f"Filtered out {filtered} non-R&D candidates")
  1330→
  1331→                # Apply company filter if specified
  1332→                if company:
  1333→                    company_lower = [cn.lower() for cn in company]
  1334→                    candidates = [c for c in candidates if any(cn in c.company.lower() for cn in company_lower)]
  1335→
  1336→                all_candidates.extend(candidates)
  1337→                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Found {len(candidates)} candidates")
  1338→
  1339→                rate_limiter.log_action("search", {
  1340→                    "keywords": keywords,
  1341→                    "page": page_num,
  1342→                    "results": len(candidates),
  1343→                    "mode": "talent_bank",
  1344→                })
  1345→
  1346→                try:
  1347→                    _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates, keywords)
  1348→                except Exception as e:
  1349→                    console.print(f"[yellow]Warning: Failed to save candidates to DB: {e}[/yellow]")
  1350→
  1351→                # Scroll for next page (infinite scroll)
  1352→                if page_num < pages:
  1353→                    await human_scroll(page, "down", distance=800)
  1354→                    await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1355→                    await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
  1356→
  1357→        except Exception as e:
  1358→            logger.error(f"Talent bank search error: {e}")
  1359→            await browser.screenshot("talent_bank_search_error")
  1360→            progress.update(task, description=f"Error: {str(e)[:40]}")
  1361→
  1362→    _log_search_history(db_manager, keywords, company, None, pages, len(all_candidates))
  1363→
  1364→    console.print(f"[green]Talent bank search complete. Found {len(all_candidates)} candidates.[/green]")
  1365→    return all_candidates

1900→async def _find_im_chat_frame(im_page: Page):
  1901→    """Find the chat iframe inside an IM tab page.
  1902→
  1903→    The IM page embeds the actual chat UI in an iframe with URL
  1904→    pattern: /chat?fr=ent&in_iframe=1&...
  1905→
  1906→    Returns:
  1907→        The chat Frame, or None if not found.
  1908→    """
  1909→    for frame in im_page.frames:

  1911→            return frame
  1912→    return None

  1915→async def _exchange_in_im_tab(
  1916→    browser: 'BrowserManager',
  1917→    config,
  1918→    exchange_phone: bool,
  1919→    exchange_wechat: bool,
  1920→) -> None:
  1921→    """Switch to the IM tab and click exchange phone/WeChat buttons.
  1922→
  1923→    The exchange buttons live inside a chat iframe within the IM tab.
  1924→    Each button is a ``div.tool.normal`` with a ``.tool-text`` child
  1925→    whose text is "交换电话" or "交换微信".  After clicking, the button
  1926→    state changes to ``div.tool.disable`` ("申请中" / "交换中").
  1927→
  1928→    Args:
  1929→        browser: BrowserManager with open IM tab
  1930→        config: Config instance
  1931→        exchange_phone: Click "交换电话"
  1932→        exchange_wechat: Click "交换微信"
  1933→    """
  1934→    # Find the IM tab
  1935→    im_page = None
  1936→    for p in browser.context.pages:
  1937→        if "im" in p.url and "direct_modal" in p.url:
  1938→            im_page = p
  1939→            break
  1940→
  1941→    if not im_page:
  1942→        logger.warning("Talent bank exchange: IM tab not found")
  1943→        return
  1944→
  1945→    try:
  1946→        # Wait for iframe to load
  1947→        await im_page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=8000)
  1948→        await im_page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
  1949→
  1950→        chat_frame = await _find_im_chat_frame(im_page)
  1951→        if not chat_frame:
  1952→            logger.warning("Talent bank exchange: chat iframe not found")
  1953→            return
  1954→
  1955→        if exchange_phone:
  1956→            try:
  1957→                phone_btn = chat_frame.locator("div.tool.normal .tool-text", has_text="交换电话").first
  1958→                if await phone_btn.count() > 0:
  1959→                    await phone_btn.click()
  1960→                    logger.info("Talent bank: clicked 交换电话")
  1961→                    await im_page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
  1962→                else:
  1963→                    logger.debug("Talent bank: 交换电话 button not available (already exchanged or disabled)")
  1964→            except Exception as e:
  1965→                logger.debug(f"Talent bank: exchange phone failed: {e}")
  1966→
  1967→        if exchange_wechat:
  1968→            try:
  1969→                wechat_btn = chat_frame.locator("div.tool.normal .tool-text", has_text="交换微信").first
  1970→                if await wechat_btn.count() > 0:
  1971→                    await wechat_btn.click()
  1972→                    logger.info("Talent bank: clicked 交换微信")
  1973→                    await im_page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
  1974→                else:
  1975→                    logger.debug("Talent bank: 交换微信 button not available (already exchanged or disabled)")
  1976→            except Exception as e:
  1977→                logger.debug(f"Talent bank: exchange wechat failed: {e}")
  1978→
  1979→    except Exception as e:
  1980→        logger.error(f"Talent bank exchange error: {e}")

110→class PipelineRequest(BaseModel):
   111→    keywords: List[str] = Field(min_length=1)
   112→    company: List[str] = Field(default_factory=list)
   113→    location: Optional[str] = None
   114→    pages: int = Field(default=1, ge=1, le=50)
   115→    template: str
   116→    variables: Dict[str, str] = Field(default_factory=dict)
   117→    auto_send: bool = Field(default=False, description="Skip confirmation, send immediately")
   118→    dry_run: bool = Field(default=False, description="Search only, no messages")
   119→    batch_pages: Optional[int] = Field(default=None, ge=1, description="Batch size in pages (None = all-at-once)")

Now let me look at the _extract_talent_bank_results more carefully. I noticed it has an issue with the skipPatterns - let me check if "发送后继续沟通" should be included in the skip patterns:

Based on my thorough code review of the talent_bank functionality, here are all the findings:

## COMPREHENSIVE TALENT_BANK CODE REVIEW FINDINGS

### CRITICAL BUGS (严重)

**1. Missing tab closing logic in search_candidates_talent_bank()**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/search.py` (Lines 1214-1365)
- **Severity**: 严重 (Critical)
- **Issue**: The `search_candidates_talent_bank()` function navigates to the talent bank page but NEVER closes the tab when `keep_tab_open=False`. Unlike `search_candidates_enterprise()` which has a `finally` block that closes the tab (lines 1016-1022), talent_bank has no tab cleanup logic at all.
- **Impact**: On every non-inline search (pipeline without keep_tab_open=True), a new tab accumulates in the browser. After multiple searches, the browser will have dozens of unclosed tabs causing memory leaks and potential tab management errors.
- **Historical**: This is a NEW issue specific to talent_bank implementation
- **Fix**: Add `talent_bank_tab_opened = False` tracking and implement a `finally` block identical to enterprise:
  ```python
  finally:
      if talent_bank_tab_opened and not keep_tab_open:
          try:
              await browser.close_current_tab()
          except Exception:
              pass
  ```
  Note: Talent_bank doesn't open a new tab like enterprise does (it navigates the current tab), so the flag tracking and close logic may differ slightly from enterprise.

---

**2. Incorrect locator syntax in _exchange_in_im_tab()**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/message.py` (Lines 1957, 1969)
- **Severity**: 严重 (Critical)
- **Issue**: Using `.locator("div.tool.normal .tool-text", has_text="...")` is invalid Playwright syntax. The `has_text` parameter doesn't exist in Playwright's locator syntax. The correct syntax is `.locator("div.tool.normal", has=frame.locator(".tool-text:has-text('...')"))` or use `filter()` method.
  ```python
  # WRONG (lines 1957, 1969):
  phone_btn = chat_frame.locator("div.tool.normal .tool-text", has_text="交换电话").first
  
  # CORRECT:
  phone_btn = chat_frame.locator("div.tool.normal").filter(has_text="交换电话").locator(".tool-text").first
  ```
- **Impact**: This code will throw `TypeError` or `AttributeError` at runtime whenever exchange_phone or exchange_wechat is True, causing the exchange feature to silently fail in exception handlers.
- **Historical**: New bug in talent_bank implementation
- **Fix**: Use proper Playwright filter syntax or switch to using page.evaluate() for more robust selection

---

**3. Race condition: IM tab lookup by URL pattern is fragile**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/message.py` (Lines 1936-1939)
- **Severity**: 严重 (Critical)
- **Issue**: The code searches for the IM tab by checking `"im" in p.url and "direct_modal" in p.url`. If the URL pattern changes (very likely with Maimai updates), or if multiple pages match this pattern, the function silently returns `None` without error, then the exchange features fail silently.
  ```python
  if not im_page:
      logger.warning("Talent bank exchange: IM tab not found")
      return  # Silent failure
  ```
- **Impact**: Exchange phone/WeChat feature silently fails with no clear user feedback. Users think the exchange happened but it didn't.
- **Historical**: New in talent_bank
- **Fix**: Validate that im_page was found and raise an explicit error, or implement a more robust tab detection mechanism (e.g., by URL whitelist, by looking for specific content on the page)

---

### HIGH-PRIORITY ISSUES (中等-高)

**4. Missing "keep_tab_open" parameter handling inconsistency**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/search.py` (Line 1235)
- **Severity**: 中等 (Medium-High)
- **Issue**: Unlike `search_candidates_enterprise()`, the talent_bank function declares `keep_tab_open` parameter but never uses it. The parameter is documented but has no effect whatsoever.
- **Impact**: The parameter is misleading. When developers call `search_candidates_talent_bank(..., keep_tab_open=True)`, they expect the tab to stay open, but it won't because there's no logic to track and preserve it.
- **Historical**: New parameter in talent_bank
- **Fix**: Either implement the keep_tab_open logic or remove the parameter entirely. If implementing, must track which tab was opened and conditionally close it.

---

**5. Incomplete error recovery in _find_im_chat_frame()**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/message.py` (Lines 1900-1912)
- **Severity**: 中等 (Medium)
- **Issue**: The function iterates through frames looking for one with URL pattern `/chat?` and `in_iframe`. If NO frame matches (which is very possible due to frame loading timing), it returns `None`. The caller then logs a warning and returns silently. There's no retry logic, no timeout adjustment, no fallback.
- **Impact**: If the iframe hasn't finished loading yet (2000ms wait in _exchange_in_im_tab might not be enough), the exchange operation fails silently.
- **Historical**: New in talent_bank
- **Fix**: Implement a retry loop in `_exchange_in_im_tab()` before giving up, or increase the wait time with progressive retries

---

**6. Configuration version mismatch**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/config/selectors.json` (Line 2)
- **Severity**: 中等 (Medium)
- **Issue**: The config version is "1.4.0" but the MEMORY.md indicates previous versions were 1.2.0. No changelog or migration notes. If talent_bank selectors differ from enterprise (which they should given different page structures), the version number should have been bumped with release notes.
- **Impact**: If developers compare with historical configs, they won't know what changed.
- **Historical**: Not directly talent_bank related but affects maintainability
- **Fix**: Update changelog/release notes; consider semantic versioning that indicates breaking changes

---

**7. Unused selectors in talent_bank config**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/config/selectors.json` (Lines 15-18)
- **Severity**: 中等 (Medium)
- **Issue**: Selectors `im_exchange_phone`, `im_exchange_wechat`, `im_tool_normal`, `im_tool_disable` are defined but NEVER used anywhere in the code. The actual implementation uses hardcoded selector strings in message.py.
  ```javascript
  // In code (lines 1957, 1969):
  chat_frame.locator("div.tool.normal .tool-text", has_text="交换电话")
  
  // Defined in config but not used:
  "im_exchange_phone": "div.tool.normal:has(.tool-text:text-is('交换电话'))"
  ```
- **Impact**: Maintenance nightmare - if the selector needs updating, developers have to look in two places and know which one actually matters. Dead code.
- **Historical**: New dead selectors in talent_bank section
- **Fix**: Either use the config selectors in the code, or remove them from the config

---

### MEDIUM ISSUES (中等)

**8. Duplicate extraction logic between enterprise and talent_bank**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/search.py` (Lines 1050-1179 vs 1388-1532)
- **Severity**: 中等 (Medium)
- **Issue**: `_extract_enterprise_results()` and `_extract_talent_bank_results()` are nearly identical (483 lines of duplicated JavaScript extraction code). The only meaningful difference is one additional skip pattern in talent_bank: `/^发送后继续沟通$/` and `/^搜索$/`. This violates DRY principle and makes future maintenance harder.
- **Impact**: Bug fixes to extraction logic must be applied in two places. This is a RECURRING issue noted in MEMORY.md as one of the 5 architectural problems.
- **Historical**: Recurring technical debt from multiple reviews
- **Fix**: Extract common extraction logic into a single `_extract_enterprise_style_results(page, skip_patterns)` function that both enterprise and talent_bank call with their own skip patterns

---

**9. Missing edge case: empty candidate list after filtering**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/message.py` (Lines 2159-2161)
- **Severity**: 中等 (Medium)
- **Issue**: In `send_message_batch_talent_bank()`, after filtering already-messaged candidates, the function checks `if not send_list` and returns early. However, if there are candidates but they're all already-messaged, the user sees only a generic "[yellow]No candidates to send messages to.[/yellow]". This could be confusing if the user filtered by 1000 candidates but all were already messaged.
- **Impact**: Poor UX - unclear why no messages were sent
- **Historical**: Not exclusive to talent_bank (same issue in enterprise), but worth fixing for consistency
- **Fix**: Improve the message: `f"[yellow]All {len(candidates)} candidates already messaged. Skipping send.[/yellow]"`

---

**10. Unsafe company filter in talent_bank search**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/search.py` (Line 1334)
- **Severity**: 中等 (Medium)
- **Issue**: The company filter uses `c.company.lower()` without checking if `c.company` is empty/None first:
  ```python
  candidates = [c for c in candidates if any(cn in c.company.lower() for cn in company_lower)]
  ```
  If a candidate has no company name (empty string or None), this will fail with `AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'lower'` or `TypeError`.
- **Impact**: Crash when processing candidates without company info
- **Historical**: New in talent_bank (enterprise uses `c.company.lower()` similarly at line 1334 too - this is a pre-existing bug!)
- **Fix**: Add None/empty check: `candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.company and any(cn in c.company.lower() for cn in company_lower)]`

---

### MINOR ISSUES (轻微)

**11. Inconsistent error handling between search and message phases**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/message.py` (Lines 2024-2083)
- **Severity**: 轻微 (Minor)
- **Issue**: `send_message_talent_bank_inline()` has a broad try-except that catches ALL exceptions and returns False. This masks actual errors (like AttributeError from locator syntax bug #2, or network errors). Should distinguish between recoverable and non-recoverable failures.
- **Impact**: Hard to debug what went wrong
- **Historical**: Same pattern in enterprise_inline, not exclusive to talent_bank
- **Fix**: Catch specific exceptions, re-raise unrecoverable ones

---

**12. Magic number: 2000ms timeout for IM tab opening**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/message.py` (Line 2059)
- **Severity**: 轻微 (Minor)
- **Issue**: Hard-coded `await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)` to wait for IM tab to open. This magic number is not configurable and may be insufficient on slow networks.
- **Impact**: On slow connections, the IM tab might not open in time, causing exchange attempts to fail
- **Historical**: New in talent_bank
- **Fix**: Make this configurable via config.json or use a more robust wait strategy (wait for new tab to appear, not just sleep)

---

**13. Missing "talent_bank_tab_opened" initialization before try block**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/search.py` (Line 1251)
- **Severity**: 轻微 (Minor)
- **Issue**: Unlike enterprise which initializes `enterprise_tab_opened = False` at line 882 before the try block, talent_bank doesn't initialize any tab-tracking variable. This would be needed IF you implement the tab closing fix for issue #1.
- **Impact**: No impact now, but code smell and prerequisite for fixing #1
- **Historical**: New in talent_bank
- **Fix**: Add `talent_bank_tab_opened = False` after line 1250

---

**14. Unreachable code in _close_im_tabs()**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/message.py` (Lines 1986-1991)
- **Severity**: 轻微 (Minor)
- **Issue**: The outer try-except in `_close_im_tabs()` swallows all exceptions silently. If an exception occurs (e.g., page already closed), it logs as debug and returns None. This is okay for robustness, but the broad catch makes it hard to diagnose issues.
- **Impact**: Silent failures in tab cleanup
- **Historical**: New in talent_bank
- **Fix**: At minimum, log warnings for unexpected errors, not just debug

---

**15. Config selector syntax inconsistency**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/config/selectors.json` (Lines 7-13 vs 21-31)
- **Severity**: 轻微 (Minor)
- **Issue**: Talent_bank selectors use Playwright locator syntax (e.g., `text='招人'`) while some enterprise selectors use CSS (e.g., `input[placeholder='...']`). Mix of syntaxes makes it confusing which is which. The code calls `config.get_selector()` which returns a string, then passes it to either `wait_for_selector()` or `.locator()`. If a CSS selector is passed to `.locator()`, it may fail.
- **Impact**: Potential runtime errors if selectors are accidentally mixed
- **Historical**: Not new, but talent_bank amplifies the issue
- **Fix**: Enforce one selector syntax format consistently, or add a selector_type field to config

---

### VALIDATION ISSUES (验证)

**16. Missing validation of exchange_phone/exchange_wechat in schemas**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/web/schemas.py` (Lines 122-123)
- **Severity**: 轻微 (Minor)
- **Issue**: `PipelineRequest` accepts `exchange_phone` and `exchange_wechat` for ANY mode, not just talent_bank. There's no validation that these are only set when `mode=talent_bank`. Users could send `curl -X POST /api/pipeline -d '{..., "mode": "search_center", "exchange_phone": true}'` and the field would be silently ignored.
- **Impact**: Confusing behavior; users might wonder why exchange didn't work
- **Historical**: New in talent_bank
- **Fix**: Add a Pydantic validator to check: if mode != talent_bank, then exchange_phone and exchange_wechat must both be False

---

## SUMMARY TABLE

| # | Issue | File | Lines | Severity | Category |
|---|-------|------|-------|----------|----------|
| 1 | Missing tab closing | search.py | 1214-1365 | 严重 | Tab Management |
| 2 | Invalid locator syntax | message.py | 1957, 1969 | 严重 | Browser API |
| 3 | Fragile IM tab detection | message.py | 1936-1943 | 严重 | Tab Management |
| 4 | Unused keep_tab_open param | search.py | 1235 | 中等 | API Design |
| 5 | Missing iframe retry logic | message.py | 1900-1912 | 中等 | Error Handling |
| 6 | Config version inconsistency | selectors.json | 2 | 中等 | Maintenance |
| 7 | Unused selectors | selectors.json | 15-18 | 中等 | Dead Code |
| 8 | Duplicate extraction code | search.py | 1050-1532 | 中等 | Code Quality |
| 9 | Poor empty list message | message.py | 2159-2161 | 中等 | UX |
| 10 | Unsafe .lower() call | search.py | 1334 | 中等 | Bug |
| 11 | Broad exception handling | message.py | 2024-2083 | 轻微 | Debugging |
| 12 | Magic timeout value | message.py | 2059 | 轻微 | Configuration |
| 13 | Missing tab_opened variable | search.py | 1251 | 轻微 | Code Smell |
| 14 | Silent tab cleanup failures | message.py | 1986-1991 | 轻微 | Logging |
| 15 | Selector syntax mix | selectors.json | 7-31 | 轻微 | Consistency |
| 16 | Missing mode validation | schemas.py | 122-123 | 轻微 | Validation |

---

## RECOMMENDED ACTION PLAN

**Immediate (today)**:
1. Fix issues #2 (locator syntax) and #3 (IM tab detection) - these cause runtime failures
2. Fix issue #1 (tab closing) - critical memory leak
3. Fix issue #10 (None check for company) - prevents crashes

**This week**:
4. Fix issue #4 (keep_tab_open logic)
5. Fix issue #16 (mode validation in PipelineRequest)

**Next iteration (architectural)**:
6. Fix issue #8 (deduplicate extraction code) - this is listed in MEMORY.md as one of 5 key problems
7. Fix issue #6 (config versioning and changelog)

  ```javascript
  "im_exchange_phone": "div.tool.normal:has(.tool-text:text-is('交换电话'))"
  ```
- **Impact**: Maintenance nightmare - if the selector needs updating, developers have to look in two places and know which one actually matters. Dead code.
- **Historical**: New dead selectors in talent_bank section
- **Fix**: Either use the config selectors in the code, or remove them from the config

---

### MEDIUM ISSUES (中等)

**8. Duplicate extraction logic between enterprise and talent_bank**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/search.py` (Lines 1050-1179 vs 1388-1532)
- **Severity**: 中等 (Medium)
- **Issue**: `_extract_enterprise_results()` and `_extract_talent_bank_results()` are nearly identical (483 lines of duplicated JavaScript extraction code). The only meaningful difference is one additional skip pattern in talent_bank: `/^发送后继续沟通$/` and `/^搜索$/`. This violates DRY principle and makes future maintenance harder.
- **Impact**: Bug fixes to extraction logic must be applied in two places. This is a RECURRING issue noted in MEMORY.md as one of the 5 architectural problems.
- **Historical**: Recurring technical debt from multiple reviews
- **Fix**: Extract common extraction logic into a single `_extract_enterprise_style_results(page, skip_patterns)` function that both enterprise and talent_bank call with their own skip patterns

---

**9. Missing edge case: empty candidate list after filtering**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/message.py` (Lines 2159-2161)
- **Severity**: 中等 (Medium)
- **Issue**: In `send_message_batch_talent_bank()`, after filtering already-messaged candidates, the function checks `if not send_list` and returns early. However, if there are candidates but they're all already-messaged, the user sees only a generic "[yellow]No candidates to send messages to.[/yellow]". This could be confusing if the user filtered by 1000 candidates but all were already messaged.
- **Impact**: Poor UX - unclear why no messages were sent
- **Historical**: Not exclusive to talent_bank (same issue in enterprise), but worth fixing for consistency
- **Fix**: Improve the message: `f"[yellow]All {len(candidates)} candidates already messaged. Skipping send.[/yellow]"`

---

**10. Unsafe company filter in talent_bank search**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/search.py` (Line 1334)
- **Severity**: 中等 (Medium)
- **Issue**: The company filter uses `c.company.lower()` without checking if `c.company` is empty/None first:
  ```python
  candidates = [c for c in candidates if any(cn in c.company.lower() for cn in company_lower)]
  ```
  If a candidate has no company name (empty string or None), this will fail with `AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'lower'` or `TypeError`.
- **Impact**: Crash when processing candidates without company info
- **Historical**: New in talent_bank (enterprise uses `c.company.lower()` similarly at line 1334 too - this is a pre-existing bug!)
- **Fix**: Add None/empty check: `candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.company and any(cn in c.company.lower() for cn in company_lower)]`

---

### MINOR ISSUES (轻微)

**11. Inconsistent error handling between search and message phases**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/message.py` (Lines 2024-2083)
- **Severity**: 轻微 (Minor)
- **Issue**: `send_message_talent_bank_inline()` has a broad try-except that catches ALL exceptions and returns False. This masks actual errors (like AttributeError from locator syntax bug #2, or network errors). Should distinguish between recoverable and non-recoverable failures.
- **Impact**: Hard to debug what went wrong
- **Historical**: Same pattern in enterprise_inline, not exclusive to talent_bank
- **Fix**: Catch specific exceptions, re-raise unrecoverable ones

---

**12. Magic number: 2000ms timeout for IM tab opening**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/message.py` (Line 2059)
- **Severity**: 轻微 (Minor)
- **Issue**: Hard-coded `await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)` to wait for IM tab to open. This magic number is not configurable and may be insufficient on slow networks.
- **Impact**: On slow connections, the IM tab might not open in time, causing exchange attempts to fail
- **Historical**: New in talent_bank
- **Fix**: Make this configurable via config.json or use a more robust wait strategy (wait for new tab to appear, not just sleep)

---

**13. Missing "talent_bank_tab_opened" initialization before try block**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/search.py` (Line 1251)
- **Severity**: 轻微 (Minor)
- **Issue**: Unlike enterprise which initializes `enterprise_tab_opened = False` at line 882 before the try block, talent_bank doesn't initialize any tab-tracking variable. This would be needed IF you implement the tab closing fix for issue #1.
- **Impact**: No impact now, but code smell and prerequisite for fixing #1
- **Historical**: New in talent_bank
- **Fix**: Add `talent_bank_tab_opened = False` after line 1250

---

**14. Unreachable code in _close_im_tabs()**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/modules/message.py` (Lines 1986-1991)
- **Severity**: 轻微 (Minor)
- **Issue**: The outer try-except in `_close_im_tabs()` swallows all exceptions silently. If an exception occurs (e.g., page already closed), it logs as debug and returns None. This is okay for robustness, but the broad catch makes it hard to diagnose issues.
- **Impact**: Silent failures in tab cleanup
- **Historical**: New in talent_bank
- **Fix**: At minimum, log warnings for unexpected errors, not just debug

---

**15. Config selector syntax inconsistency**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/config/selectors.json` (Lines 7-13 vs 21-31)
- **Severity**: 轻微 (Minor)
- **Issue**: Talent_bank selectors use Playwright locator syntax (e.g., `text='招人'`) while some enterprise selectors use CSS (e.g., `input[placeholder='...']`). Mix of syntaxes makes it confusing which is which. The code calls `config.get_selector()` which returns a string, then passes it to either `wait_for_selector()` or `.locator()`. If a CSS selector is passed to `.locator()`, it may fail.
- **Impact**: Potential runtime errors if selectors are accidentally mixed
- **Historical**: Not new, but talent_bank amplifies the issue
- **Fix**: Enforce one selector syntax format consistently, or add a selector_type field to config

---

### VALIDATION ISSUES (验证)

**16. Missing validation of exchange_phone/exchange_wechat in schemas**
- **File**: `/Users/zhouboli/Documents/maimai-assistant/src/web/schemas.py` (Lines 122-123)
- **Severity**: 轻微 (Minor)
- **Issue**: `PipelineRequest` accepts `exchange_phone` and `exchange_wechat` for ANY mode, not just talent_bank. There's no validation that these are only set when `mode=talent_bank`. Users could send `curl -X POST /api/pipeline -d '{..., "mode": "search_center", "exchange_phone": true}'` and the field would be silently ignored.
- **Impact**: Confusing behavior; users might wonder why exchange didn't work
- **Historical**: New in talent_bank
- **Fix**: Add a Pydantic validator to check: if mode != talent_bank, then exchange_phone and exchange_wechat must both be False

---

## SUMMARY TABLE

| # | Issue | File | Lines | Severity | Category |
|---|-------|------|-------|----------|----------|
| 1 | Missing tab closing | search.py | 1214-1365 | 严重 | Tab Management |
| 2 | Invalid locator syntax | message.py | 1957, 1969 | 严重 | Browser API |
| 3 | Fragile IM tab detection | message.py | 1936-1943 | 严重 | Tab Management |
| 4 | Unused keep_tab_open param | search.py | 1235 | 中等 | API Design |
| 5 | Missing iframe retry logic | message.py | 1900-1912 | 中等 | Error Handling |
| 6 | Config version inconsistency | selectors.json | 2 | 中等 | Maintenance |
| 7 | Unused selectors | selectors.json | 15-18 | 中等 | Dead Code |
| 8 | Duplicate extraction code | search.py | 1050-1532 | 中等 | Code Quality |
| 9 | Poor empty list message | message.py | 2159-2161 | 中等 | UX |
| 10 | Unsafe .lower() call | search.py | 1334 | 中等 | Bug |
| 11 | Broad exception handling | message.py | 2024-2083 | 轻微 | Debugging |
| 12 | Magic timeout value | message.py | 2059 | 轻微 | Configuration |
| 13 | Missing tab_opened variable | search.py | 1251 | 轻微 | Code Smell |
| 14 | Silent tab cleanup failures | message.py | 1986-1991 | 轻微 | Logging |
| 15 | Selector syntax mix | selectors.json | 7-31 | 轻微 | Consistency |
| 16 | Missing mode validation | schemas.py | 122-123 | 轻微 | Validation |

---

## RECOMMENDED ACTION PLAN

**Immediate (today)**:
1. Fix issues #2 (locator syntax) and #3 (IM tab detection) - these cause runtime failures
2. Fix issue #1 (tab closing) - critical memory leak
3. Fix issue #10 (None check for company) - prevents crashes

**This week**:
4. Fix issue #4 (keep_tab_open logic)
5. Fix issue #16 (mode validation in PipelineRequest)

**Next iteration (architectural)**:
6. Fix issue #8 (deduplicate extraction code) - this is listed in MEMORY.md as one of 5 key problems
7. Fix issue #6 (config versioning and changelog)

file.content:
await async_random_delay("message")

    return results


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Talent Bank inline messaging (Path C)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


async def _find_im_chat_frame(im_page: Page):
    """Find the chat iframe inside an IM tab page.

    The IM page embeds the actual chat UI in an iframe with URL
    pattern: /chat?fr=ent&in_iframe=1&...

    Returns:
        The chat Frame, or None if not found.
    """
    for frame in im_page.frames:
        if "chat?" in frame.url and "in_iframe" in frame.url:
            return frame
    return None


async def _exchange_in_im_tab(
    browser: 'BrowserManager',
    config,
    exchange_phone: bool,
    exchange_wechat: bool,
) -> None:
    """Switch to the IM tab and click exchange phone/WeChat buttons.

    The exchange buttons live inside a chat iframe within the IM tab.
    Each button is a ``div.tool.normal`` with a ``.tool-text`` child
    whose text is "交换电话" or "交换微信".  After clicking, the button
    state changes to ``div.tool.disable`` ("申请中" / "交换中").

    Args:
        browser: BrowserManager with open IM tab
        config: Config instance
        exchange_phone: Click "交换电话"
        exchange_wechat: Click "交换微信"
    """
    # Find the IM tab
    im_page = None
    for p in browser.context.pages:
        if "im" in p.url and "direct_modal" in p.url:
            im_page = p
            break

    if not im_page:
        logger.warning("Talent bank exchange: IM tab not found")
        return

    try:
        # Wait for iframe to load
        await im_page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=8000)
        await im_page.wait_for_timeout(2000)

        chat_frame = await _find_im_chat_frame(im_page)
        if not chat_frame:
            logger.warning("Talent bank exchange: chat iframe not found")
            return

        if exchange_phone:
            try:
                phone_btn = chat_frame.locator("div.tool.normal .tool-text", has_text="交换电话").first
                if await phone_btn.count() > 0:
                    await phone_btn.click()
                    logger.info("Talent bank: clicked 交换电话")
                    await im_page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
                else:
                    logger.debug("Talent bank: 交换电话 button not available (already exchanged or disabled)")
            except Exception as e:
                logger.debug(f"Talent bank: exchange phone failed: {e}")

        if exchange_wechat:
            try:
                wechat_btn = chat_frame.locator("div.tool.normal .tool-text", has_text="交换微信").first
                if await wechat_btn.count() > 0:
                    await wechat_btn.click()
                    logger.info("Talent bank: clicked 交换微信")
                    await im_page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
                else:
                    logger.debug("Talent bank: 交换微信 button not available (already exchanged or disabled)")
            except Exception as e:
                logger.debug(f"Talent bank: exchange wechat failed: {e}")

    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"Talent bank exchange error: {e}")


async def _close_im_tabs(browser: 'BrowserManager', search_page: Page) -> None:
    """Close all IM tabs, keeping the search page."""
    try:
        for p in list(browser.context.pages):
            if p != search_page and ("im" in p.url or "direct_modal" in p.url):
                await p.close()
                await search_page.wait_for_timeout(500)
    except Exception as e:
        logger.debug(f"Talent bank: IM tab cleanup: {e}")


async def send_message_talent_bank_inline(
    page: Page,
    content: str,
    browser: 'BrowserManager',
    config=None,
    exchange_phone: bool = False,
    exchange_wechat: bool = False,
) -> bool:
    """Send a message inline on the talent bank page, optionally exchange phone/WeChat.

    Clicks "立即沟通" on the current candidate card, optionally fills a custom
    message in the textarea, then clicks "发送后继续沟通".  A new IM tab opens
    after sending.  If exchange_phone or exchange_wechat is True, switches to the
    IM tab and clicks the exchange buttons in the chat iframe before closing.

    Args:
        page: Playwright page on the talent bank results page
        content: Message content to send
        browser: BrowserManager for tab management
        config: Config instance (loaded if None)
        exchange_phone: Click "交换电话" in IM tab after sending
        exchange_wechat: Click "交换微信" in IM tab after sending

    Returns:
        True if message was sent successfully
    """
    if config is None:
        config = get_config()

    try:
        # Click 立即沟通
        chat_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.chat_now_button")
        chat_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(chat_sel, timeout=5000)
        if not chat_btn:
            logger.warning("Talent bank: 立即沟通 button not found")
            return False

        await human_click(page, chat_sel)
        await async_random_delay("action")

        # Try to fill custom message in textarea (if dialog has one)
        textarea_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.message_textarea")
        try:
            textarea = await page.wait_for_selector(textarea_sel, timeout=3000)
            if textarea:
                await textarea.click()
                select_all_key = "Meta+a" if sys.platform == "darwin" else "Control+a"
                await page.keyboard.press(select_all_key)
                await page.keyboard.press("Backspace")
                await human_type(page, textarea_sel, content)
                await async_random_delay("action")
        except Exception:
            logger.debug("Talent bank: no message textarea found, using default greeting")

        # Click 发送后继续沟通
        send_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.send_continue_button")
        send_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(send_sel, timeout=5000)
        if not send_btn:
            logger.warning("Talent bank: send button not found")
            return False

        await human_click(page, send_sel)
        await async_random_delay("action")

        # Wait for IM tab to open
        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)

        # --- Exchange phone/WeChat in the IM tab ---
        if (exchange_phone or exchange_wechat) and browser.tab_count > 1:
            await _exchange_in_im_tab(browser, config, exchange_phone, exchange_wechat)

        # Close IM tabs
        await _close_im_tabs(browser, page)

        # Close any modal/popup on search page
        close_modal_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.close_modal")
        try:
            close_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(close_modal_sel, timeout=2000)
            if close_btn:
                await close_btn.click()
                await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        except Exception:
            pass

        logger.info("Talent bank: message sent inline")
        return True

    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"Talent bank inline send failed: {e}")
        return False


async def send_message_batch_talent_bank(
    page: Page,
    candidates: List[dict],

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Talent Bank recruitment path (Path C)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

TALENT_BANK_URL = "https://maimai.cn/ent/v41/recruit/talents"
TALENT_BANK_SEARCH_URL = "https://maimai.cn/ent/v41/recruit/talents?pid=&tab=1"
TALENT_BANK_ENTRY_URL = "https://maimai.cn/ent/v41/index"


async def search_candidates_talent_bank(
    keywords: str,
    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
    pages: int = 1,
    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
    keep_tab_open: bool = False,
) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
    """Search for candidates via the talent bank path.

    Flow:
    1. Navigate to enterprise entry -> click "招人" -> click "搜索" tab
    2. Input keywords in search box -> Enter
    3. Extract candidates from results
    4. For additional pages, scroll to trigger infinite scroll
    5. Close tab unless keep_tab_open is True

    Args:
        keywords: Search keywords
        company: Filter by company names (optional)
        pages: Number of scroll-pages to extract
        browser: Browser manager instance
        keep_tab_open: If True, leave talent bank tab open (for inline messaging)

    Returns:
        List of CandidateBasic objects
    """
    validate_keywords(keywords)

    if browser is None:
        browser = get_browser_manager()

    config = get_config()
    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
    db_manager = get_db_manager()

    await ensure_logged_in(browser)

    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
    seen_ids: set = set()

    with Progress(
        SpinnerColumn(),
        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
        console=console,
    ) as progress:
        task = progress.add_task("Opening talent bank...", total=None)

        try:
            await async_check_rate_limit("search")

            page = browser.page

            # Step 1: Navigate to talent bank entry
            progress.update(task, description="Navigating to talent bank...")
            await retry_navigation(page, TALENT_BANK_ENTRY_URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
            await async_random_delay("page_load")

            # Click "招人" to enter talent bank
            entry_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.entry_button")
            entry_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(entry_sel, timeout=8000)
            if not entry_btn:
                raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Could not find talent bank entry: {entry_sel}")
            await entry_btn.click()
            await async_random_delay("page_load")

            # Wait for talent bank URL
            try:
                await page.wait_for_url(
                    lambda url: "recruit/talents" in url,
                    timeout=15000,
                )
            except Exception:
                logger.warning(f"Talent bank URL not matched, current: {page.url}")

            # Click "搜索" tab
            search_tab_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.search_tab")
            search_tab = await page.wait_for_selector(search_tab_sel, timeout=5000)
            if search_tab:
                await search_tab.click()
                await async_random_delay("page_load")

            # Step 2: Input keywords and search
            progress.update(task, description=f"Searching: {keywords}")

            search_input_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.search_input")
            await page.wait_for_selector(search_input_sel, timeout=8000)
            await human_type(page, search_input_sel, keywords)
            await async_random_delay("action")
            await page.keyboard.press("Enter")
            await async_random_delay("page_load")

            # Wait for results to load
            await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)

            # Step 3: Extract candidates (with pagination via scroll)
            for page_num in range(1, pages + 1):
                progress.update(task, description=f"Extracting page {page_num}/{pages}...")

                candidates = await _extract_talent_bank_results(page)

                # Deduplicate across scroll pages
                candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids]
                for c in candidates:
                    seen_ids.add(c.maimai_id)

                if not candidates:
                    logger.info(f"No talent bank results on page {page_num}")
                    break

                # Filter non-R&D roles
                before_filter = len(candidates)
                candidates = [c for c in candidates if not _is_non_rd_title(c.title)]
                filtered = before_filter - len(candidates)
                if filtered > 0:
                    logger.info(f"Filtered out {filtered} non-R&D candidates")

                # Apply company filter if specified
                if company:
                    company_lower = [cn.lower() for cn in company]
                    candidates = [c for c in candidates if any(cn in c.company.lower() for cn in company_lower)]

                all_candidates.extend(candidates)
                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Found {len(candidates)} candidates")

                rate_limiter.log_action("search", {
                    "keywords": keywords,
                    "page": page_num,
                    "results": len(candidates),
                    "mode": "talent_bank",
                })

                try:
                    _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates, keywords)
                except Exception as e:
                    console.print(f"[yellow]Warning: Failed to save candidates to DB: {e}[/yellow]")

                # Scroll for next page (infinite scroll)
                if page_num < pages:
                    await human_scroll(page, "down", distance=800)
                    await async_random_delay("page_load")
                    await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)

        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Talent bank search error: {e}")
            await browser.screenshot("talent_bank_search_error")
            progress.update(task, description=f"Error: {str(e)[:40]}")

    _log_search_history(db_manager, keywords, company, None, pages, len(all_candidates))

    console.print(f"[green]Talent bank search complete. Found {len(all_candidates)} candidates.[/green]")
    return all_candidates


async def _extract_talent_bank_results(page: Page) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
    """Extract candidate information from talent bank results page.

    The talent bank UI uses the same enterprise card layout.
    Uses JS-based extraction tailored to the talent bank cards.

    Args:
        page: Playwright page instance on the talent bank results page

    Returns:
        List of CandidateBasic objects
    """

Now let me verify the locator syntax issue more carefully. In Playwright Python, `.locator()` does accept `has_text` as a keyword parameter. Let me check this.

Actually, looking at the Playwright Python API docs: `page.locator(selector, has_text=...)` IS a valid syntax. The `has_text` parameter is a valid keyword argument for `locator()` in Playwright Python.

So Finding #2 is INCORRECT - the locator syntax is valid.

However, there's still a potential issue: `chat_frame.locator("div.tool.normal .tool-text", has_text="交换电话").first` - this uses `.first` which returns a Locator, and then calls `.count()` on it. But `.first` already selects the first match, so `.count()` on a `.first` locator... Let me think about this.


Actually, when I call `.count()` on a locator that's already been filtered with `.first`, it returns either 0 or 1, so the check `await phone_btn.count() > 0` works correctly to verify the element exists. And since `Frame.locator()` does support the `has_text` parameter just like `page.locator()` does, the subagent's finding #2 is actually incorrect.

For finding #1 about missing tab close logic, I need to reconsider—the talent bank path navigates within the current page rather than opening a new tab like the enterprise path does, so there's no tab leak to worry about. The subagent was partially mistaken on this one too.

Finding #4 about the unused `keep_tab_open` parameter does seem valid though, since talent bank doesn't actually open new tabs. Let me trace through the pipeline code to see how this parameter flows through and verify what's actually happening.

validate_keywords(keywords)

    if browser is None:
        browser = get_browser_manager()

    config = get_config()
    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
    db_manager = get_db_manager()

    await ensure_logged_in(browser)

    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
    enterprise_tab_opened = False

    with Progress(
        SpinnerColumn(),
        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
        console=console,
    ) as progress:
        task = progress.add_task("Opening enterprise recruitment...", total=None)

        try:
            await async_check_rate_limit("search")

            # Always start from the primary tab to avoid navigating user's open content
            browser.switch_to_primary_tab()
            page = browser.page

            # Step 1: Navigate to homepage and click 招聘 tab
            await retry_navigation(page, MAIMAI_HOME_URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
            await async_random_delay("page_load")

            sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.recruitment_tab")
            recruitment_tab = await page.wait_for_selector(sel, timeout=5000)
            if not recruitment_tab:
                raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Could not find recruitment tab: {sel}")

            # Click opens a new tab — use BrowserManager API
            await recruitment_tab.click()
            page = await browser.wait_for_new_tab(timeout=15000)
            enterprise_tab_opened = True

            progress.update(task, description="Enterprise page loaded")

            # Wait for the enterprise page URL
            try:
                await page.wait_for_url(
                    lambda url: ENTERPRISE_URL_MARKER in url,
                    timeout=15000,
                )
